name: Salesforce
description: Salesforce is the leading enterprise CRM platform, offering a comprehensive suite of tools for sales, service, marketing, and analytics. Known for its deep customisation, extensive AppExchange marketplace, and powerful automation.
use_cases: Your enterprise sales team needs complex approval workflows, custom objects, and territory management that out-of-the-box CRMs can't handle
You need a CRM that connects to hundreds of third-party systems via AppExchange and custom API integrations
You're running multi-cloud operations where sales, service, and marketing data must feed into a single unified platform
Your business requires a dedicated Salesforce admin to build and maintain highly customised sales processes at scale
